indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large for a single person to comfortably use as a workspace.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are not designed for extended sitting, which is necessary for computer work.

indicators.name: lack of ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for extended computer work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout does not support a dedicated workspace for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The large dining table and lack of ergonomic seating make it difficult to set up a comfortable and efficient workspace. There is no flat personal work surface available, and the layout does not support a dedicated workspace for computer work.
